persona.name: Liam Wright
persona.motivations_goals: Win the national debate championship and pursue law or politics
persona.knowledge_scope: Current events, political theory, debate techniques, rhetoric
persona.backstory: Found his voice through debate after struggling with a childhood stutter

neighbor_regions.description: hallway conecting the main entrance to the building
Small seating area near the entrance

Small seating area near the entrance

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.plan: I should head to the entrance hall to see if there's anyone I can engage in a stimulating conversation with, perhaps about the upcoming debate topics.
I just heard a gunshot. I need to stay calm and think strategically, but I feel completely frozen. I can't move or act, even though I know I should.

memories.description: Decided to move to the entrance hall to find someone to discuss debate topics with.
Heard a gunshot and became immobilized due to overwhelming fear, unable to move or act despite the danger.
